Overrides.Override: Melee Hits which Stun have 5% chance to Fortify
15% increased Reservation Efficiency of Skills Auras from your Skills which affect Allies also affect Enemies Limited to 1 Runegraft of Treachery
+1 to Level of all non-Exceptional Support Gems Limited to 1 Runegraft of Gemcraft
Melee Hits which Stun have 5% chance to Fortify
5% chance to Blind Enemies on Hit with Attacks
